title: Sleek UI
description: This is a simple GUI texture pack made for people that want a smooth and sleek interface that can be in a Dark or OLED fashion
body:
# Supports versions 1.19 - 26.1.2 in a Dark and OLED theme

### All of the |Dark| versions are labeled with |Alpha| while the |OLED| versions are labeled with |Release| in the [versions tab](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sleek-ui/versions) for easy sorting and downloading

All there is to know is that it changes the GUI to be smooth and simple

This takes major inspiration from the bedrock ore ui but with my own spin on it

## Mod UI Support V1.0.9
Mostly tested on fabric but should work on neoforge too

Just remember to put this texture pack above the mod resources
